subtitle: The first platform built on Anthropic's peer-reviewed 4D AI Fluency Framework

slides.title: AI Fluency
slides.subtitle: Enterprise AI Readiness Assessment & Development Platform
slides.tagline: Measure and grow your organization's AI fluency with behavioral science.

slides.heading: The Problem
slides.statement: Organizations are flying blind on AI readiness
points: 94% of companies have NOT started AI upskilling programs (PwC) — yet workers with AI skills earn a 56% wage premium
No standardized measurement — organizations rely on generic quizzes or course completions that don't measure behavioral fluency
No validated framework — existing tools test AI knowledge, not behavioral competency across real-world tasks
No personalized remediation — generic training wastes budget; L&D teams cannot demonstrate ROI without pre/post behavioral data
AI skill relevance degrades every ~2 years — 42% of workers expect AI-driven role changes

slides.heading: The Solution
slides.statement: The only platform implementing Anthropic's peer-reviewed 4D AI Fluency Framework
points: 4-Dimension Assessment — Delegation, Description, Discernment, Diligence with 24 empirically-validated behavioral indicators
Prevalence-weighted scoring — derived from analysis of 9,830+ real AI conversations for scientific rigor
Personalized learning paths — AI-curated content targeting each learner's weakest dimensions first
Longitudinal tracking — reassessment proves improvement and demonstrates training ROI with hard data

features.title: 4D Assessment
features.description: Delegation, Description, Discernment, Diligence — 24 behavioral indicators

features.title: Learning Paths
features.description: AI-curated paths: AI Foundations, Prompt Engineering, Critical AI Evaluation

features.title: Gap Detection
features.description: Discernment gap analysis identifies specific fluency weaknesses

features.title: Progress Tracking
features.description: Longitudinal assessment with before/after ROI proof

timeline.milestone: PRD complete with full C4 architecture, sequence diagrams, and data model
MVP built — Registration, Authentication, 4D Assessment, Learning Paths, Dashboard
20 E2E Playwright tests with full visual coverage across 8 user flows

competitors.name: iMocha
competitors.note: Generic AI quizzes, no behavioral framework

competitors.name: DataCamp
competitors.note: Data skills only, not AI fluency

slides.heading: Vision
slides.statement: Become the global standard for AI fluency measurement and development
milestones: 2026: Launch MVP with 4D assessment — 20 enterprise pilots, $500K ARR
2027: Add team analytics + LTI university integration — 200 organizations, $2M ARR
2028: Industry benchmarks + API platform — 1,000 organizations, $5M ARR
2030: The definitive AI readiness platform — embedded in enterprise L&D worldwide
